name: Warlock: Hellish Rebuke Defense + Pact Slot Economy (WL2)
description: A level 5 Fiend Warlock (Malachar) faces Warlord Bane across three rounds. Tests: (1) Hellish Rebuke damage reaction fires when Malachar is hit — 2d10 fire back to attacker, DEX save DC 15 for half, costs 1 Pact Magic slot; (2) Pact Magic pool decrements correctly from 2→1→0 after two HR uses; (3) After both pact slots are spent, Hellish Rebuke NO LONGER fires — pactMagic=0 check in warlock.ts detect() returns null; (4) Eldritch Blast (cantrip, 2 beams at L5) never costs a pact slot. Warlord Bane uses behavior 'attack' each round. queueDiceRolls forces a deterministic hit each round. The third monster attack verifies no HR reaction prompt is generated when pactMagic=0.

actions.comment: === COMBAT START === Malachar initiates. DEX 14 → +2 mod. Roll 20 = 22 init. Warlord Bane max = 20+1=21, Bandit Thug max = 20+0=20. Malachar always goes first.

input.text: I channel my dark pact against Warlord Bane

actions.comment: Initiative: 20 + 2 DEX = 22. Malachar leads the combat.
=== ROUND 1 — Malachar's turn: Eldritch Blast (cantrip, 2 beams at L5, FREE — no pact slot) ===

input.text: cast Eldritch Blast at Warlord Bane

actions.comment: Beam 1 attack: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 14 → HIT.
Beam 1 damage: 8 force. Warlord Bane: 120 - 8 = 112 HP. Beam 2 queued — actionComplete: false.
Beam 2 attack: 12 + 7 = 19 vs AC 14 → HIT.
Beam 2 damage: 6 force. Warlord Bane: 112 - 6 = 106 HP. Both beams done — actionComplete: true. pactMagic still 2 (cantrip costs nothing).
Verify EB dealt force damage and pactMagic is untouched (cantrip).
Queue dice for Warlord Bane's attack: [15] = d20 attack (15+5=20 ≥ AC 13 → HIT), [5] = d8 damage (5+3=8 slashing to Malachar).
Malachar ends his turn. Warlord Bane (behavior: attack) attacks with Longsword — dice queue ensures a hit.
Warlord Bane's attack hits Malachar for 8 slashing. Hellish Rebuke reaction detected: Malachar has pactMagic>0 and hasHellishRebukePrepared=true. Reaction prompt fires.
Malachar uses Hellish Rebuke: 2d10 fire damage to Warlord Bane, DEX save DC 15 for half (WB DEX 13 → +1 mod). Spends 1 pactMagic slot: 2 → 1.
Wait for Warlord Bane's turn to complete (Bandit Thug endTurns). Control returns to Malachar.
R1 post-turn assertions: pactMagic decremented to 1, Malachar took 8 slashing (queued), Warlord Bane took EB force + Hellish Rebuke fire (random 2d10 save vs DC 15).
=== ROUND 2 — Malachar: Eldritch Blast again (cantrip, still free). pactMagic remains 1 until HR fires again. ===

input.text: cast Eldritch Blast at Warlord Bane

actions.comment: Beam 1 attack: 15 + 7 = 22 vs AC 14 → HIT.
Beam 1 damage: 7 force. Beam 2 queued.
Beam 2 attack: 11 + 7 = 18 vs AC 14 → HIT.
Beam 2 damage: 5 force. Last beam — actionComplete: true.
Queue dice for R2 Warlord Bane attack: [15] = hit (15+5=20 ≥ 13), [6] = d8 damage (6+3=9 slashing).
End Malachar's R2 turn. Warlord Bane attacks again (behavior: attack).
Warlord Bane hits for 9 slashing. HR eligible (pactMagic=1>0, reaction not yet used this turn). Reaction prompt fires.
Malachar uses Hellish Rebuke again: 2d10 fire to Warlord Bane, DEX save DC 15 for half. This spends the LAST pactMagic slot: 1 → 0.
Wait for monster turns to complete. Control returns to Malachar.
R2 post-turn: pactMagic is now 0 (both L3 pact slots spent on Hellish Rebuke). Malachar at ~83 HP (92-9). Warlord Bane took additional EB + HR damage.
=== ROUND 3 — pactMagic DEPLETED. Eldritch Blast cantrip still works (no slot needed). Target Bandit Thug to preserve Warlord Bane's HP range. ===

input.text: cast Eldritch Blast at Bandit Thug

actions.comment: Beam 1 attack: 12 + 7 = 19 vs Bandit Thug AC 12 → HIT.
Beam 1 damage: 9 force. Bandit Thug: 80 - 9 = 71 HP. Beam 2 queued.
Beam 2 attack: 10 + 7 = 17 vs AC 12 → HIT.
Beam 2 damage: 4 force. Bandit Thug: 71 - 4 = 67 HP. Both beams done.

Queue dice for R3 Warlord Bane attack: [15] = hit (15+5=20 ≥ 13), [6] = d8 damage (6+3=9 slashing). NOTE: pactMagic=0, so Hellish Rebuke CANNOT fire — detect() returns null when no pact slot is available.
End R3 turn. Warlord Bane attacks and hits — but NO waitForReaction step follows. This proves HR is blocked when pactMagic=0.
waitForTurn proceeds WITHOUT a reaction pause — HR was not offered because pactMagic=0. If HR mistakenly fired, this step would hang waiting for a reaction prompt, exposing the bug.
=== FINAL ASSERTIONS: Both pact slots consumed, cantrip still dealt damage, both monsters alive, combat ongoing. ===
